state.message: Did not recognize the instrument. Please teach me about this instrument.

project.title: Gardnerella vaginalis cell surface shaving
project.projectDescription: Study of Gardnerella vaginalis cell surface proteome
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Gardnerella vaginalis live cell trypsin treatment to shave surface proteome. LC-MS/MS. LTQ Orbitrap.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Mascot search engine and Thermo Proteome Discoverer 1.4.  Parent tol : 10 ppm.  Fragment tol: 0.4 Da.  Search DB: Partial import of (Mascot5_gardnerella__All entries) 20130922;  ProteomeDiscoverer:Use Neutral Loss y Ions: true;   ProteomeDiscoverer:Use Neutral Loss b Ions: true;   ProteomeDiscoverer:Maximum Missed Cleavage Sites: 2;  ProteomeDiscoverer:Mascot:Significance Middle: 0.05; ProteomeDiscoverer:Mascot:Weight of Y Ions: true;  ProteomeDiscoverer:Mascot:Weight of B Ions: true;  ProteomeDiscoverer:Mascot:Significance High: 0.01

labPIs.title: Dr
labPIs.affiliation: Departamento de Microbiología II, Universidad Complutense Madrid
labPIs.name: Concha Gil García

references.referenceLine: Marín E, Haesaert A, Padilla L, Adán J, Hernáez ML, Monteoliva L, Gil C.  Surface Proteins Using Cell Shaving Proteomics. Front Microbiol. 2018 9:975

Characteristics[CleavageAgent]: 3 μg of recombinant sequencing grade trypsin (ROCHE)
Characteristics[SamplingTime]: early exponential growth phase culture (100 ml; OD600 ∼ 0.2)
Comment[Instrument]: Easy-nLC II system coupled to an ion trap LTQ-Orbitrap-Velos-Pro mass spectrometer (Thermo Scientific)
Comment[GradientTime]: using a 110-min gradient from 0 to 40% solvent B
Comment[IonizationType]: ESI ionization was achieve using a Nano-bore emitters Stainless Steel ID 30 μm (Proxeon) interface
Comment[AcquisitionMethod]: survey scans from 400 to 1600 amu (1 μscan), followed by fragmentation of the 15 most intense ions by Collision Induced Dissociation
Comment[PrecursorMassTolerance]: tolerances of 20 ppm for precursor ions
Comment[NumberOfMissedCleavages]: up to two missed cleavage sites allowed
